$schema_note: M5 multi-stakeholder profiles. Primary pair: Tom (§12.2) + synthetic finance lead S.K.; secondary pair (§12.3 archetype): Emma + bookkeeper A.B. Anonymised initials. No PII.

profiles.summary: Series-B SaaS · 22 FTE · €18K/mo card spend on AWS + SaaS · just raised €15M · top objection 'we already use Brex'. Brief §12.2.
signals: 12 new engineering hires in last 90 days (LinkedIn growth)
Heavy AWS + Anthropic + OpenAI spend (vendor-stack scan)
profiles.ideal_opener: I saw you closed Series-B last quarter — how are you handling per-employee card issuance for your new hires?

profiles.summary: Synthetic finance lead (Phase 5 cohort-1 will validate — see Evidence note). Owns FX exposure tracking + NetSuite reconciliation. Reports to Tom. Joins his discovery calls when finance topics surface.
signals: Posts on FX hedging in finance Slack communities
profiles.ideal_opener: What does your monthly EUR-USD volume on supplier payments look like?
profiles.top_objection: Our finance stack is fine — we don't need another tool

profiles.summary: Industrial manufacturing · 78 FTE · €42K/mo card spend · brief §12.3. Top pain: bookkeeping drudgery — supplier receipts arrive late, accountant re-keys.
signals: Job posting for 'AP clerk · receipt processing' last week
profiles.ideal_opener: How much time does your bookkeeping team spend re-keying supplier receipts every month?
profiles.top_objection: Our accountant won't deal with another tool

profiles.summary: Emma's external bookkeeper (per §12.3 archetype). Owns Xero data entry + month-end close. Decision veto: if she says no, Emma walks. Joins discovery calls when accounting-stack topics come up.
signals: Posts about month-end pain in bookkeeper Slack
profiles.ideal_opener: When supplier receipts arrive on paper or email, what's your current workflow to get them into Xero?
profiles.top_objection: I don't want another tool to log into
